news.t: New Home Sales Fall 6% in April as Median Price Surges
New Home Sales Rise as Median Price Hits Near 5-Year Low
Wall Street is divided on the outlook for US house prices. Here's what 6 experts have recently said.

holdings.infoBox: REZ is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Welltower stock at 22.72%, Public Storage at 9.30%, Ventas at 7.25%, Extra Space Storage at 5.71%, and Equity Residential at 4.63%.

overview.description: The iShares Residential and Multisector Real Estate ETF (REZ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Nareit All Residential Capped index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US residential, health care, and specialized REITs. REZ was launched on May 1, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: FTSE Nareit All Residential Capped Index
